raw.subject: Your Hollister page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed the American flag in your recent post honoring local veterans. It's clear you're not just a pet sitting service, you're part of the community.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean potential clients are having trouble finding you online and reaching out to book your services.

I took a closer look at your Facebook posts and photos, and I sketched out a simple homepage idea that showcases your services and photos. You could have a clear services overview, a photo gallery of happy pets, and a contact section with your hours and map.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/cradled-critters-pet-sitting-services-llc-hollister

If you're interested in bringing this online, it's a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. Feel free to reply or give me a quick call to discuss details.
